characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Big Brother Instinct: Initially, Hayley is very protective of Alex and constantly stands up for him when he's bullied by Daniel and other Eagles. First Friend: To Jackie, after being the first to offer to take a lie detector test for her.

characters.name: Hayley Woods
characters.description: Big Brother Instinct: Initially, Hayley is very protective of Alex and constantly stands up for him when he's bullied by Daniel and other Eagles. First Friend: To Jackie, after being the first to offer to take a lie detector test for her.

characters.name: Leo Cruz
characters.description: Act of True Love: Leo dives into an ocean during an earthquake to rescue Hayley. Childhood Friend Romance: With Aspen.

characters.name: Emma Geller
characters.description: Beginner's Luck: Emma, who has hardly ever played chess, beats Max in a match.

characters.name: Jackie Sanders
characters.description: Aborted Arc: Season 2 ends with Jackie and Max getting together, only for them to break them up almost immediately due to Jackie's actress leaving. Deadpan Snarker: Jackie is consistently sarcastic and snarky. Defrosting Ice Queen: Jackie is particularly cold to everybody upon her arrival to The Greenhouse, but she begins to warm up to others after Hayley and the other Ravens take the polygraph test for her and after Max sets up the Toy Story screening for her. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: Rebellious, blunt, and sarcastic but ultimately a good person. Opposites Attract: Jackie is attracted to Max, who is sweet, sensitive, and cautious.

characters.name: Max Miller
characters.description: Cowardly Lion: Is typically reluctant to take part in anything potentially dangerous, though he typically winds up doing it anyway for the sake of the group. Endearingly Dorky: Must be, since he's somehow able to score both Jackie and Emma. Good Samaritan: Towards Jackie when he sets up the Toy Story movie screening for her. Hard Work Hardly Works: Max has studied chess extensively—only to be taken down by chess beginner Emma. Opposites Attract: Max is attracted to Jackie, who is blunt, sarcastic, and impulsive.

characters.name: Aspen Fairchild
characters.description: Childhood Friend Romance: With Leo. Giftedly Bad: Aspen and her singing. (Although she studied music, everybody cringes whenever she sings.)

characters.name: Becca
characters.description: Suspiciously Similar Substitute: After Aspen leaves the show, Becca is given many of her qualities, as well as a similar relationship with Leo and the others.

characters.name: Alex Woods
characters.description: Raven Hair, Ivory Skin: Alex has dark, nearly black hair and very fair skin. The Scapegoat: At the beginning of the series, The Eagles dislike him so much that they blame him for anything they can, like for losing the opening challenge.

characters.name: Daniel Hayward
characters.description: Disappeared Dad: While Daniel's mother is prominently shown throughout the first couple of seasons, Daniel's father is never seen or mentioned. I Want My Beloved to Be Happy: When Daniel lets Hayley go to be with Leo in Season 4. Jerk Jock: In the first and second seasons, until he teams up with Hayley. Tall, Dark, and Handsome: Daniel is the tallest on the main cast, has dark hair and skin, and is good-looking enough to have multiple relationships throughout the series.

characters.name: Brooke Osmond
characters.description: Break the Cutie: After being imprisoned and hypnotized, Brooke, who for a while was on a sweet streak, is left tormented. Out-of-Character Moment: After Season 2, much of Brooke's actions and characterizations are starkly out of character compared to the prior version, like when she breaks up with Alex during a basketball game.

characters.name: Sophie Cardona
characters.description: Action Girl: She's a go-getter who always overcomes every obstacle in her way. Once Done, Never Forgotten: After Sophie sends Parker's confession to the news, The Eagles hold this over Sophie's head and use it to alienate her for the majority of the season.

characters.name: Parker Grant
characters.description: Jerk Jock: At the beginning of the first season.
